M-026.NAME: admin-audit-log
M-026.owns: admin action audit trail and request logging middleware for /api/v1/admin/* endpoints

exports.type-AdminAuditEvent: Persisted record of admin action with admin_id, action, resource_type, resource_id, details
exports.fn-log-admin-action: Writes an audit record for an admin API request
exports.type-AdminAuditMiddleware: FastAPI middleware that logs all admin API requests
